categories.description: Fires on EventAnnounced. Audience: tenant members with the appropriate visibility. Opt-in — new-event announcements are marketing-adjacent.
Fires T-24h + T-1h before registration_opens_at. Audience: tenant members with visibility >= tenant_only who match the event's eligibility (age range + gender). Opt-in.
Fires T-48h + T-24h + T-2h before registration_closes_at. Audience: eligible tenant members who have NOT yet registered. Skipped when late window exists (T-2h is redundant with late-window UX).
Fires T-24h + T-1h before starts_at. Audience: registered participants + coaches + guardians for minor participants. Includes venue + timezone + livestream URL when public.

Fires on EventCancellationBroadcast. Cannot opt out — a cancellation affects every registrant's calendar + refund posture. Individual email + push per registrant + guardian (not batched). Includes cancellation_reason.
Fires on EventRescheduled. Cannot opt out. Individual email + push to registrants + coaches + guardians for minors. Includes before/after date range + venue.
Fires on EventVenueChanged (branch_id OR primary facility). Cannot opt out. Includes before/after venue + travel guidance.

Fires on EventPricingChanged when audit_severity='critical' (post-registration_open). Cannot opt out. Includes before/after entry_fee + refund information. Financial audit-critical — 7-year retention on the audit trail.

Fires on EventMinorEligibilityCorrected. Sent to excluded registrants + guardians of excluded minors. Cannot opt out. Includes the new eligibility rules + refund posture. Regulatory-adjacent for child-safeguarding regulators.

Fires on EventLivestreamActivated. Audience: registered participants + coaches + guardians (for private-tier password delivery). Password delivered via secure email; no in-app rendering of the password. Opt-in.
